title: Enhanced Warriors
description: This is a modpack that adds various animations and new items and much more, to make the fighting aspect of the game much better, and more fun.
body:
This modpack adds Animations, Textures, New items, Shaders, Camera mods, Optimization and more.
It is recommended if you like fighting and want it to be better. Dual wield with quivers on your hip or back in pure astetics, all while it being recorded by flashback to edit later.
It has see over shoulder mods, and animations for everything! See _mods_ below for a full list.

## How To Install

1. Go to the Modrinth app
2. Search for "Enhanced Warriors" and click install
3. Click play and fight with style!

## Please Read

The camera does not have a stopper for seeing through blocks. If you go in a cave, and look around in third person, you can see through blocks. This could be counted as cheating and you shouldn't use on a server. If you can find a mod that fixes this, install it and you can play on servers! (Also send a message in the bug reports discord chat so I can install it to the modpack.)

## Why install this

If you want to fight but the animations and camera angles look boring, install this! It has weapon, moving and throwing animations, shaders for a better look, flashback to edit and view your fights, more items and texures and finally bug fixes and small tweaks.

## Creators

HorizonPiece05

## Recommended

If you want to make your own modpack, download [Make A Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/make-a-modpack). It has base mods for you to create your own modpack.

## Q and A coming soon!

Click [here](https://discord.gg/vpsYHT4YEG) to join my discord and ask questions for Q and A
